summary: TypeScript runtime for self-organizing AI agents Discussion | Link
content: Mozaik enables autonomous agent teams to work concurrently, react to events, communicate intelligently, and decide how collaboration should unfold during execution.
chineseSummary: 自组织 AI 代理的 TypeScript 运行时讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Mozaik 使自主代理团队能够同时工作、对事件做出反应、智能通信并决定在执行过程中如何开展协作。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
